The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Impact Summit 2024 – Star Atlas
Star Atlas posted a video of their Impact Summit.
Star Atlas Impact summit 2024
Star Atlas TV posted a video of a livestream from the Star Atlas Impact Summit.
Star Atlas Keynote Impact Summit
Beyond the Horizon posted an excerpt of the keynote session from the Impact Summit.
Star Atlas: 12 Minutes Early Campaign-Style Footage
Beyond the Horizon posted an except of a campaign gameplay from the Impact Summit.
STAR ATLAS #253 CONFERENCE HIGHLIGHTS! What The Hell Happened!?
MeteVerse Explorer posted a video of highlights from the Impact Summit.
Metaverse Nomads #165 Star Atlas Breakpoint Recap
Metaverse Nomads posted their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #148
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas: Keynote Speech Review
OCG Thor posted a video of his review of the Star Atlas Impact Summit keynote.
The Atlas Brew 129
Star Atlas TV posted the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Brew #129: Live from Singapore – TLDR
Beth posted a video recapping the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Impact Summit Final Overview
Beyond the Horizon posted an overview of the Star Atlas Impact Summit.
Star Atlas Ships – Introducing the Pearce F4
Star Atlas posted a video showing the Pearce F4 ship.
